name: Imgbb
tagline: Upload and host images with ImgBB
description: Upload an image (as base64 data or a source URL) to ImgBB and receive a hosted image URL, display URL, and delete URL. Requires a free ImgBB API key.

auth.hint: Get a free API key from your ImgBB account (api.imgbb.com), sent as the key query parameter on every request.

tools.name: upload_image
tools.description: Upload an image (base64-encoded data or a source URL) and return its hosted URLs.

params.name: image
params.description: Image content as a base64-encoded string, or a URL pointing to an image to fetch and host (maximum 32 MB).

params.name: name
params.description: Optional filename for the uploaded image.

params.name: expiration
params.description: Seconds until the image is automatically deleted; between 60 and 15552000.
